_comment: SINGLE SOURCE for MCP servers. Each adapter renders its harness's native format. transport is 'http' (url) or 'stdio' (command+args). Add a secret-bearing server with an 'auth' block: {"header":"x-api-key","headersHelper":"~/.config/x/headers.sh","env":"X_API_KEY"} — Claude uses the headersHelper script, Copilot/OpenCode a ${env}/{env:} header. Opt a server out of one harness with e.g. "opencode":{"enabled":false}. Ships with one real, no-auth server so a first apply works; add your own.
